name: business-website-skill
description: Build client-ready corporate, brand, B2B, service, and proposal-grade business websites from source materials with phased discovery, evidence mapping, design direction choices, implementation, and QA.
author: ChuluuMGL

templates.name: static-business-site
templates.description: Dependency-free static business website starter with generic placeholders.

scripts.name: audit_static_site
scripts.description: Checks local static site assets, anchors, duplicate IDs, viewport metadata, image alt attributes, and CSS url() references.

compatibility.notes: Core workflow uses SKILL.md, references, scripts, and assets. agents/openai.yaml is Codex-specific UI metadata and can be ignored by other runtimes.

related_skills.name: proposal-ppt-skill
related_skills.description: Create stage-gated business proposal decks and presenter scripts.

related_skills.name: yueyu-skill
related_skills.description: Query YUEYU TECH company and marketing-service information.

related_skills.name: dy-creative-skill
related_skills.description: Query DY Creative&Tech marketing services and lead capture.
